title: Trump Signals Major UFO Disclosure Coming Soon

title: Donald Trump says pilots 'saw things you wouldn't believe' as UFO files set for release
description: US President Donald Trump has confirmed his administration is preparing to release declassified UFO files, saying pilots reported extraordinary sightings.

title: "Things you wouldn't believe": Trump pledges declassification of secret UFO files
description: Washington DC [US], April 30 (ANI): US President Donald Trump on Wednesday signalled a massive shift in government transparency regarding Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP).
